qa_pairs.question: What is the default Home space quota on the Fir cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: On the Fir cluster, the default Home space quota is 50 GB and 500,000 files per user.

qa_pairs.question: Are files in the Home space on the Fir cluster backed up?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, files in the Home space on the Fir cluster are backed up.

qa_pairs.question: Is the Home space on the Fir cluster purged?
qa_pairs.answer: No, the Home space on the Fir cluster is not purged.

qa_pairs.question: What is the default Scratch space quota for a user on the Fir cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: The default Scratch space quota on the Fir cluster is 20 TB and 1,000,000 files per user.

qa_pairs.question: When are files purged from the Scratch space on the Fir cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: Files older than 60 days are purged from the Scratch space on the Fir cluster.

qa_pairs.question: Is the Scratch space on the Fir cluster backed up?
qa_pairs.answer: No, the Scratch space on the Fir cluster is not backed up.

qa_pairs.question: What is the default Project space quota per group on the Fir cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: The default Project space quota on the Fir cluster is 1 TB and 500,000 files per group.

qa_pairs.question: How can the Project space quota be increased on the Fir cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: Project space on the Fir cluster can be increased up to 40 TB per group through a Rapid Access Service (RAS) request, or for larger increases, an application to the annual Resource Allocation Competition is required. The group's sponsoring PI should contact technical support for RAS requests.

qa_pairs.question: Is Nearline space mounted on compute nodes on the Fir cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: No, Nearline space is not mounted on compute nodes on the Fir cluster.

qa_pairs.question: What is the default Home space quota on the Nibi cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: On the Nibi cluster, the default Home space quota is 50 GB and 500,000 files per user.

qa_pairs.question: Is the Home space on the Nibi cluster Lustre-based?
qa_pairs.answer: No, the Home space on the Nibi cluster is not Lustre-based.

qa_pairs.question: What is the soft quota for Scratch space per user on the Nibi cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: On the Nibi cluster, there is a 1 TB soft quota on Scratch space per user, which allows temporary exceeding for up to 60 days.

qa_pairs.question: Is the Scratch space on the Nibi cluster backed up?
qa_pairs.answer: No, the Scratch space on the Nibi cluster is not backed up.

qa_pairs.question: What is the default Nearline space quota per group on the Nibi cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: The default Nearline space quota on the Nibi cluster is 10 TB and 5,000 files per group.

qa_pairs.question: What is the default Home space quota on the Narval and Rorqual clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: On the Narval and Rorqual clusters, the default Home space quota is 50 GB and 500,000 files per user.

qa_pairs.question: Are files purged from Scratch space on the Narval and Rorqual clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, files older than 60 days are purged from the Scratch space on the Narval and Rorqual clusters.

qa_pairs.question: What is the default Nearline space quota per group on the Narval and Rorqual clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: The default Nearline space quota on the Narval and Rorqual clusters is 1 TB and 5,000 files per group.

qa_pairs.question: Since when have new Rapid Access Service (RAS) policies allowed larger quotas for project and nearline spaces on clusters like Fir, Nibi, Narval, and Rorqual?
qa_pairs.answer: Since April 1, 2024, new Rapid Access Service (RAS) policies have allowed larger quotas for project and nearline spaces on these clusters.

qa_pairs.question: What is the default Home space quota on the Trillium cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: On the Trillium cluster, the Home space ($HOME) has a quota of 100 GB and 1,000,000 files per user.

qa_pairs.question: How is the Home directory accessed on compute nodes on the Trillium cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: The Home directory ($HOME) on the Trillium cluster is available on compute nodes in a read-only capacity.

qa_pairs.question: Is the Scratch space ($SCRATCH) on the Trillium cluster backed up?
qa_pairs.answer: No, the Scratch space ($SCRATCH) on the Trillium cluster is not backed up.

qa_pairs.question: What is the default Project space quota on the Trillium cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: The default Project space ($PROJECT) quota on the Trillium cluster is 1 TB and 2,000,000 files per default allocation.

qa_pairs.question: Where is the Archive (nearline) space located for the Trillium cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: The Archive (a.k.a. nearline) space for the Trillium cluster is on HPSS.

qa_pairs.question: Do compute nodes on the Trillium cluster have local storage?
qa_pairs.answer: No, compute nodes on the Trillium cluster do not have local storage.

qa_pairs.question: What is the Home space quota on the Killarney cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: On the Killarney cluster, the Home space ($HOME) has a quota of 50 GB per user.

qa_pairs.question: What is the Scratch space quota for CIFAR AI Chairs on the Killarney cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: For CIFAR AI Chairs on the Killarney cluster, the Scratch space ($SCRATCH) quota is 2 TB per user.

qa_pairs.question: What is the expiration time for files in the Scratch space on the Killarney cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: Files in the Scratch space on the Killarney cluster have an expiration time of 2 months.

qa_pairs.question: What is the Project space quota for Faculty members applying AI to other domains on the Killarney cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: For Faculty members applying AI to other domains on the Killarney cluster, the Project space ($PROJECT) quota is 500 GB.

qa_pairs.question: What storage technology is used for all filesystems on the Killarney cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: All filesystems on the Killarney cluster are served from VastData storage.

qa_pairs.question: What is the Home space quota on the TamIA cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: On the TamIA cluster, the Home space ($HOME) has a quota of 25 GB per user.

qa_pairs.question: Is the Home space on the TamIA cluster backed up?
qa_pairs.answer: No, the Home space on the TamIA cluster is not backed up.

qa_pairs.question: What is the Project space quota for AI Institute Faculty Affiliates on the TamIA cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: For AI Institute Faculty Affiliates on the TamIA cluster, the Project space ($PROJECT) quota is 2 TB.

qa_pairs.question: Is the Project space on the TamIA cluster backed up?
qa_pairs.answer: No, the Project space on the TamIA cluster is not backed up.

qa_pairs.question: What is the Scratch space quota for Faculty members within an AI program on the TamIA cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: For Faculty members within an AI program on the TamIA cluster, the Scratch space ($SCRATCH) quota is 500 GB per user.

qa_pairs.question: What is the Home space quota on the Vulcan cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: On the Vulcan cluster, the Home space ($HOME) has a quota of 50 GB per user.

qa_pairs.question: What is the Scratch space quota for CIFAR AI Chairs on the Vulcan cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: For CIFAR AI Chairs on the Vulcan cluster, the Scratch space ($SCRATCH) quota is 5 TB per user.

qa_pairs.question: What is the Project space quota for AI Institute Faculty Affiliates on the Vulcan cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: For AI Institute Faculty Affiliates on the Vulcan cluster, the Project space ($PROJECT) quota is 10 TB.

qa_pairs.question: What does 'backup' typically mean for these storage systems?
qa_pairs.answer: Backup typically means a recent snapshot, not an archive of all data that ever was.

qa_pairs.question: Is the Project space on the Vulcan cluster backed up?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, the Project space on the Vulcan cluster is backed up.
